# velia_network_rdns (Resource)

Manages a reverse DNS entry for a Velia network.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "velia_network" "main" {
  filter_cidr = "192.168.190.96/28"
}

resource "velia_network_rdns" "example" {
  network_id = data.velia_network.main.id
  ip         = "192.168.190.100"
  type       = "PTR"
  rdata      = "www.example.com"
}
```

## Import

Import using `network_id:rdns_id`:

```shell
terraform import velia_network_rdns.example 3232284256:42601
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) IP address for which to set the rDNS record.
- `network_id` (String) ID of the network that owns this IP address.
- `rdata` (String) Hostname or target of the rDNS record.
- `type` (String) Record type: PTR, CNAME, or NS.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) rDNS entry ID returned by Velia.
- `version` (Number) IP version (4 or 6).
